Bash(python3.11 -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    'database/schema.py',
    'database/storage.py', 
    'database/scan_worker.py',
    'database/server.py',
    'database/routers/walls.py',
    'database/routers/climbs.py',
    'database/routers/users.py',
]
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'{f}: OK'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'{f}: SYNTAX ERROR - {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
print\('All files parse OK'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=.:hold-detector .venv/bin/python -c "
from database.schema import WallStatus, Difficulty, Classification
print\(f'WallStatus: {[s.name for s in WallStatus]}'\)
print\('Schema OK'\)

from database.server import app
print\(f'App routes:'\)
for r in app.routes:
    if hasattr\(r, 'path'\) and hasattr\(r, 'methods'\):
        print\(f'  {list\(r.methods\)} {r.path}'\)
print\('Server import OK'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -c "
from database.db import engine
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    from sqlalchemy import text
    result = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = \\'walls\\' ORDER BY ordinal_position'\)\)
    print\('walls:', [r[0] for r in result]\)
    result = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = \\'climbs\\' ORDER BY ordinal_position'\)\)
    print\('climbs:', [r[0] for r in result]\)
print\('Connected OK'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=.:hold-detector .venv/bin/python -c "
from database.storage import GCSStorage
storage = GCSStorage\(\)
url = storage.generate_upload_url\('test/verify.txt', 'text/plain', 5\)
print\(f'Signed URL works: {url[:60]}...'\)
storage.upload_bytes\(b'test', 'test/verify.txt', 'text/plain'\)
tmp = storage.download_to_tempfile\('test/verify.txt', '.txt'\)
print\(f'Round-trip OK: {open\(tmp\).read\(\)}'\)
tmp.unlink\(\)
storage.delete_prefix\('test/'\)
print\('ALL OK - dotenv loading works'\)
" 2>&1)

from database.db import engine
from sqlalchemy import text
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\)\)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -c "
from database.db import engine
from sqlalchemy import text
with engine.begin\(\) as conn:
    conn.execute\(text\('ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS google_id VARCHAR UNIQUE'\)\)
    print\('Added google_id column'\)
    
    r = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name=\\'users\\' ORDER BY ordinal_position'\)\)
    print\(f'Users columns: {[row[0] for row in r]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=.:hold-detector .venv/bin/python -c "
import cv2
from api.main import SasquatchEngine

engine = SasquatchEngine\(\)
scan = engine.create_scan\('hold-detector/3d-data/scan_1774130092.ply', 'hold-detector/3d-data/scan_1774130092.png'\)

for diff in ['easy', 'medium']:
    for style in ['static', 'dynamic']:
        img = scan.debug_routes_image\(difficulty=diff, style=style, top_k=3\)
        fname = f'test_output/fixed_routes_{diff}_{style}.png'
        cv2.imwrite\(fname, img\)
        routes = scan.get_routes\(difficulty=diff, style=style, top_k=3\)
        for i, r in enumerate\(routes\):
            print\(f'{diff}/{style} route {i+1}: {len\(r\)} holds'\)
" 2>&1)
